news.title: ASX slides, oil surges as Hormuz fight escalates
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has retreated at the open while oil prices surged after the United States and Iran ramped up their battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Olympio bags high-grade US silver and antimony plays
news.snippet: Olympio Metals has completed the acquisition of two US critical minerals projects, picking up historic silver-copper and antimony projects that have seen no modern exploration.

news.title: ‘OK, can you spell your surname’: How a super fund responded to a call for compassion
news.snippet: Testing of Australia’s superannuation funds has revealed poor call answer times, with many fobbing customers off to their websites.

news.title: Hastings scales rare earths ambitions with Thai plant expansion
news.snippet: Strong customer demand has prompted Hastings to double its Thai rare earths processing plant, creating an early revenue bridge before Yangibana starts production.

news.title: 2GB beaten again by Smooth FM in Sydney radio ratings
news.snippet: KIIS FM has continued to decline after the exit of its star broadcasters Kyle Sandilands and Jackie ‘O’ Henderson, falling another 0.8 per cent in the latest audience survey.

news.title: McLaren wraps up WA drilling blitz with bonanza titanium hits
news.snippet: McLaren Minerals has wound up the biggest drilling campaign yet at its sands project near Esperance, identifying grades up to 34.6 per cent heavy mineral and possible resource extensions.

news.title: Trump’s absurd and illegal plan will backfire on him
news.snippet: If we wanted more proof that Donald Trump has no real strategy in the war he started, we just got it.

news.title: ABC Melbourne’s ratings jump despite Pickering’s Grace Tame controversy
news.snippet: ABC Radio Melbourne has lifted itself off the mat, aided by a boost from Charlie Pickering in his first survey period as new host of its Drive program.

news.title: Former Spanish PM slammed over 'intolerable whiffs of racism' towards France team
De Minaur ends 17-year Australian drought with career-high ranking
Pay deal rejection sparks A-League men's and women's uncertainty
